name: Chocolate Cherry Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Mix all dry ingredients in a large bowl.
3. Add molasses, water, yeast, and orange peel; stir until combined.
4. Fold in chocolate chips and dried cherries.
5. Pour batter into greased loaf pan.
6. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Allow bread to cool before slicing.
